# Level Up

> Level Up is a UK feminist campaigning organisation working to advance reproductive justice, abortion decriminalisation, and freedom from systemic violence. Founded in 2018, based in London.

Level Up creates digital tools and campaigns that interrupt cultural moments to fight for gender justice. We work in campaign coalitions and gather with community through monthly workshops. Our movement includes feminists from a range of backgrounds and all genders, centring the voices of people who experience gender injustice: women, gender-nonconforming and trans people.

## About

- [Who We Are](https://welevelup.org/who-we-are): Mission, values, and approach
- [About Us](https://welevelup.org/about-us): What we do and how we work
- [Our Impact](https://welevelup.org/our-impact): Campaign wins and achievements
- [How We Choose Our Campaigns](https://welevelup.org/how-we-choose-our-campaigns): Our decision-making process

## Active Campaigns

- [Abortion is Healthcare](https://welevelup.org/active-campaigns/abortion-is-healthcare): Campaign for full decriminalisation of abortion in England and Wales. Abortion is still governed by the Offences Against the Person Act 1861 — a Victorian law. 6,100+ signatures.
- [Stop Sending Pregnant Women to Prison](https://welevelup.org/active-campaigns/pregnancy-in-prison): Campaign to end the imprisonment of pregnant women and new mothers. 196 pregnant women were in prison in 2024/25. 42 babies were born in prison. 13,100+ signatures.
- [Dignity for Dead Women](https://welevelup.org/active-campaigns/media-guidelines-domestic-abuse): Campaign for dignified, accurate media coverage of fatal domestic abuse. A woman is murdered by her partner or ex every 3 days in the UK. Level Up produced the UK's first media guidelines on reporting domestic abuse deaths. 29,200+ signatures.
- [#NoMoreLyes](https://welevelup.org/active-campaigns/nomorelyes-2): Campaign to remove toxic lye-based hair relaxers from UK shelves. These products cause chemical burns and long-term health harm, disproportionately affecting Black women. 6,400+ signatures.
- [Sexual Violence in Football](https://welevelup.org/active-campaigns/sexual-violence-in-football): Campaign demanding the Premier League and FA enforce zero tolerance of sexual violence. Level Up flew a plane banner over a football match. 4,300+ signatures.
- [Finish Holloway Women's Centre](https://welevelup.org/active-campaigns/islington-council-finish-holloway-womens-centre): Campaign for Islington Council to open the completed but empty Holloway Women's Centre, delivering vital support for women facing trauma, violence, poverty and homelessness. 1,964+ signatures.
- [We Protect Us](https://welevelup.org/active-campaigns/we-protect-us): Monthly community workshops on bystander intervention and intervening safely in police violence.

## Resources

- [#NoMoreLyes Info Kit](https://welevelup.org/resources/nomorelyes): Information about toxic hair relaxers and health risks
- [Dignity for Dead Women Media Guidelines](https://welevelup.org/resources/ddw): UK's first media guidelines on reporting domestic abuse deaths, backed by 100+ organisations and used to train 500+ journalists
- [Abortion is Healthcare Resources](https://welevelup.org/resources/abortion-is-healthcare): Policy resources and media guidelines on abortion decriminalisation
- [Pregnancy in Prison Resources](https://welevelup.org/resources/pregnancy-in-prison): Resources and legal toolkit for advocates and journalists

- [If You Like Us, Cite Us](https://welevelup.org/blog/if-you-like-us-cite-us)
- [Reclaim the Socialist Roots of International Women's Day](https://welevelup.org/blog/its-time-to-reclaim-the-socialist-roots-of-international-womens-day)
- [Abortion Is Healthcare: Why Decriminalisation Must Include Health Workers](https://welevelup.org/blog/abortion-is-healthcare-why-decriminalisation-must-include-health-workers)
- [Ending Prison for Pregnant Women: A Non-Reformist Reform](https://welevelup.org/blog/ending-prison-for-pregnant-women-a-non-reformist-reform)
- [Gender-Critical Feminism Isn't Feminist](https://welevelup.org/blog/gender-critical-feminism-isnt-feminist)
- [All blog posts](https://welevelup.org/blog)
